post.title: The Free Transfer Market: €11 Billion Hidden in Plain Sight

tweets.text:
The Free Transfer Market: €11 Billion Hidden in Plain Sight

1 in 5 transfers involves a fee. The other 80%? We tracked 5,700 free transfers across 8 leagues and 13 seasons — €11B in talent that moved for nothing.

Thread 🧵

The 80% We Never Talk About

~80% of all transfers involve no cash payment. Loans, free agents, expired contracts — they dominate every window. All the headlines go to the other 20%.

Loans, Free Agents, and the Unknown

Break it open: 39% loans, 28% undisclosed fees, 13% true free agents. That last slice — players who walked out the door for nothing — is the interesting one.

Remarkably Stable

For 13 straight seasons, free agent signings have held at 29–35% of all incoming transfers across 8 top leagues. Fees explode, volumes grow — the free share barely moves.

But the Value Is Not Stable

The rate holds steady. The talent doesn't. Total free agent market value grew from €600M in 2013 to a peak of €1.4B in 2022. "Free" stopped meaning cheap a long time ago.

The Players

Juventus appeared in the top 5 by market value 7 times — €236M in free talent. But Real Madrid leads the all-time haul: €275M across just 3 moves. One of them alone was worth €180M.

The Hall of Fame

Mbappé to Real Madrid: €180M of talent, zero fee. The most valuable free transfer on record. Then Messi €80M, Donnarumma €60M, Alaba €55M, Lewandowski €50M — all for free.

Where Do Free Agents Go?

By headcount, the Super Lig is the biggest destination — 302 free agents in. The Premier League is the opposite: 235 out, just 76 in. Volume tells one story. Value tells another.

The Same Map, Redrawn by Value

La Liga received €1,041M in free talent — a €411M net surplus. The Premier League exports €446M to La Liga alone. The volume map and the value map are completely different.

Club to Club

Real Madrid collected €275M in free talent — biggest haul of any club. PSG sent €180M out in a single move. Juventus is the most connected node: 4 of the top flows pass through them.
